demo_reconciliation.reason: Model outputs match the versioned demonstration snapshot

available_balance_tie_out.description: Available reserve equals opening balance plus current-period inflow.
available_balance_tie_out.label: Available reserve tie-out

component_totals_tie_out.description: Reported totals equal the sum of the five segregated component accounts.
component_totals_tie_out.label: Component totals tie-out

nonnegative_balances.description: Available reserve, outflow, closing balance and shortfall remain nonnegative.
nonnegative_balances.label: Nonnegative reserve balances

opening_continuity.description: Each component opening balance equals its prior-month closing balance.
opening_continuity.label: Opening balance continuity

reimbursement_lower_of.description: Event outflow equals the lower of component reserve available and event cost.
reimbursement_lower_of.label: Exact lower-of reimbursement

rollforward_tie_out.description: Closing balance equals opening balance plus inflow less outflow.
rollforward_tie_out.label: Closing balance roll-forward

shortfall_tie_out.description: Shortfall equals event cost less reserve available, floored at zero.
shortfall_tie_out.label: Funding shortfall tie-out
